scripts.verify: npm run typecheck:w2 && npm run typecheck:order-subset && node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && jest
scripts.verify:all: npm run check:contracts:ci && npm run typecheck:w2 && npm run typecheck:order-subset && npm run lint:errors && node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && jest
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:runway: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && RUNWAY_E2E_SKIP_BROWSER_WARM=1 PLAYWRIGHT_RUNWAY_USE_BUILD=0 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 playwright test --config=playwright.runway.config.ts --workers=1; E2E_EXIT=$?; node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs; exit $E2E_EXIT
scripts.test:e2e:runway:prod: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && RUNWAY_E2E_SKIP_BROWSER_WARM=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 playwright test --config=playwright.runway.config.ts --workers=1; E2E_EXIT=$?; node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs; exit $E2E_EXIT
scripts.test:runway: npm test -- --testPathPattern=runway && node scripts/validate-runway-content.mjs && node scripts/runway-doctor.mjs --skip-health && npm run test:e2e:runway
scripts.test:e2e:runway:ci: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && E2E=true NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E=true npm run build && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PORT=3124 playwright test e2e/runway.spec.ts --config=playwright.ci.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:api: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && DOMAIN_EVENT_HEALTH_SECRET=e2e-domain-health-secret playwright test e2e/domain-events-health-api.spec.ts e2e/processes-workflow-api.spec.ts e2e/b2b-operational-orders-api.spec.ts e2e/b2b-integrations-dashboard-api.spec.ts e2e/b2b-export-order-api.spec.ts e2e/b2b-create-order-platform-export-ui.spec.ts e2e/b2b-catalog.spec.ts e2e/production.spec.ts e2e/shop-erp-analytics-strip.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:verification: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/unified-ecosystem-smoke.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:light: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:cabinet-hubs: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/cabinet-hubs-smoke.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:factory-sidebar-snapshot: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/factory-sidebar-snapshot.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:shop-retail: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/shop-erp-analytics-strip.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:ru-signoff: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/workshop2-ss27-signoff-full.spec.ts e2e/workshop2-ru-full-path.spec.ts e2e/b2b-ru-buyer-path.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:b2b-ipad: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/workshop2-b2b-ipad-landscape.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:sample-shop: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 playwright test --config=playwright.sample-shop.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:sample-shop:external: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 playwright test --config=playwright.sample-shop.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:heavy: npm run test:e2e:verification && npm run test:e2e:api
scripts.deploy:runway-check: node scripts/runway-staging-env-check.mjs && npm test -- --testPathPattern=runway && node scripts/validate-runway-content.mjs && node scripts/runway-doctor.mjs --skip-health && node scripts/runway-video-lint.mjs
scripts.dev:e2e: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && sh -c 'test "$E2E_CLEAR_CACHE" = "1" && rm -rf .next .next-e2e || true' && E2E=true NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_FONTS=1 SYNTH_SKIP_ENTERPRISE_BOOTSTRAP=1 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-e2e NODE_OPTIONS=${NODE_OPTIONS:---max-old-space-size=8192} next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port ${PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PORT:-3123}
scripts.typecheck:next-pages: npm run -s build:isolated && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.next-pages.json
scripts.check:contracts: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && npm run -s check:layout-gates-package && npm run -s check:investor-demo-contract && npm run -s check:dev-perf-typecheck && npm run -s check:legacy-archive-api && npm run -s check:integrations-boundary && npm run -s check:ai-client-boundary && npm run -s check:domain-events-health-runner-parity && npm run -s check:domain-events-health-contract && npm run -s check:mock-fallback-contract && npm run -s typecheck:dev-perf && npm run -s test:layout:gates
scripts.check:contracts:ci: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && npm run -s check:layout-gates-package && npm run -s check:investor-demo-contract && npm run -s check:dev-perf-typecheck && npm run -s check:legacy-archive-api && npm run -s check:integrations-boundary && npm run -s check:ai-client-boundary && npm run -s check:domain-events-health-runner-parity && npm run -s check:domain-events-health-contract && npm run -s check:mock-fallback-contract && npm run -s typecheck:dev-perf && npm run -s test:layout:gates
scripts.reinstall: SYNTH_SKIP_DEPS_CHECK=1 node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && rm -rf node_modules .next .next-codex .next-isolated && npm install --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev:clean: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && npm run clean && next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:fast: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && SYNTH_SKIP_ENTERPRISE_BOOTSTRAP=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_FONTS=1 next dev --turbopack --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:fast:clean: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && npm run clean && SYNTH_SKIP_ENTERPRISE_BOOTSTRAP=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_FONTS=1 next dev --turbopack --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.genkit:dev: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && genkit start -- tsx src/ai/dev.ts
scripts.genkit:watch: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && genkit start -- tsx --watch src/ai/dev.ts
scripts.analyze:bundle: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && ANALYZE=true NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-analyze NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 NODE_ENV=production next build
scripts.validate:cabinet-nav: npm run validate:role-hub-matrix && npm run validate:comms-group-ids && npm run validate:syntha-core-groups && npm run validate:cabinet-nav-hrefs && npm run validate:w2-anchors
scripts.test:e2e:visual-qa: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/kill-e2e-port.cjs && playwright test e2e/workshop2-visual-qa-screenshots.spec.ts e2e/workshop2-investor-golden-path.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.dev:e2e:restart: E2E_CLEAR_CACHE=1 npm run dev:e2e:stop && npm run dev:e2e
scripts.dev:e2e:investor:restart: npm run dev:e2e:stop && E2E_CLEAR_CACHE=1 npm run dev:e2e:investor
